positive: An elegant, minimalist silhouette of a celestial fox (kitsune) performing a graceful leap under a full moon. The style is refined neo-Art Nouveau meets cosmic vaporwave. The fox is depicted with long, flowing tails and glowing, bioluminescent edges, leaving trails of deep indigo, nebula-like dust, and soft gold particles. The background is a dark, ethereal void filled with subtle, swirling constellations and geometric mandalas. Composition is centered and vertically balanced, ideal for a t-shirt print. Use strong, graphic contrasts, crisp outlines, and limited, saturated color palette emphasizing blues, purples, and golds. High contrast, clean lines, high detail, vector illustration quality.
negative: blurry, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, distorted, extra limbs, text, watermark, signature, noise, artifact, cropped, low detail, jpeg artifacts, messy, grain
